rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"The build agent failed silently — JSONL output was truncated and classify.json was never written. No error was surfaced in the build step output.","scope":"pipeline/agent-outputs"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"pnpm verify (lint/typecheck) catches pre-existing errors in the broader codebase, not just the task at hand. Classification-only tasks should suppress it.","scope":"src/server/payload"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Classification-only tasks write no source files — they only produce an output artifact (classify.json) and update status.json. The verify step is extraneous noise for such tasks.","scope":"pipeline"}]}
